# from-url

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: From-URL wallpaper source: contributes the From URL tab to the desktop wallpaper picker, emitting a pasted image URL the picker imports (and the server validates) via the import-url endpoint.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Wallpaper.Provider` "From URL"
  - Uses: `apps/surface/floating/wallpaper.Wallpaper`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/css/ui-kit.Input`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
